heading: Unfair or deceptive acts or practices with respect to substance use disorder treatment service and products
label: 45d Unfair or deceptive acts or practices with respect to substance use disorder treatment service and products
notes: References in TextThe Federal Trade Commission Act, referred to in subsec. (b)(2), is , , which is classified generally to this subchapter. L. 115–271132 Stat. 4082section 58 of this titleOct. 24, 2018

CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Opioid Addiction Recovery Fraud Prevention Act of 2018, and also as part of the Substance Use–Disorder Prevention that Promotes Opioid Recovery and Treatment for Patients and Communities Act, also known as the SUPPORT for Patients and Communities Act, and not as part of the Federal Trade Commission Act which comprises this subchapter.

Definitions, , , provided that:Pub. L. 115–271, title VIII, § 8022132 Stat. 4082Oct. 24, 2018“For purposes of this subtitle [subtitle B (§§ 8021–8023) of title VIII of , see References in Text note above] only, and not [to] be construed or applied as to challenge or affect the characterization, definition, or treatment under any other statute, regulation, or rule:Pub. L. 115–271“(1).—Substance use disorder treatment productThe term ‘substance use disorder treatment product’ means a product for use or marketed for use in the treatment, cure, or prevention of a substance use disorder, including an opioid use disorder.“(2).—Substance use disorder treatment serviceThe term ‘substance use disorder treatment service’ means a service that purports to provide referrals to treatment, treatment, or recovery housing for people diagnosed with, having, or purporting to have a substance use disorder, including an opioid use disorder.”

children.heading: Unlawful activity
children.label: a Unlawful activity
children.text: It is unlawful to engage in an unfair or deceptive act or practice with respect to any substance use disorder treatment service or substance use disorder treatment product.

children.heading: Enforcement by the Federal Trade Commission
children.label: b Enforcement by the Federal Trade Commission

children.heading: Unfair or deceptive acts or practices
children.label: 1 Unfair or deceptive acts or practices
children.text: A violation of subsection (a) shall be treated as a violation of a rule under section 18 of the Federal Trade Commission Act () regarding unfair or deceptive acts or practices.15 U.S.C. 57a

children.heading: Powers of the Federal Trade Commission
children.label: 2 Powers of the Federal Trade Commission

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Federal Trade Commission shall enforce this section in the same manner, by the same means, and with the same jurisdiction, powers, and duties as though all applicable terms and provisions of the Federal Trade Commission Act ( et seq.) were incorporated into and made a part of this section.15 U.S.C. 41

children.heading: Privileges and immunities
children.label: B Privileges and immunities
children.text: Any person who violates subsection (a) shall be subject to the penalties and entitled to the privileges and immunities provided in the Federal Trade Commission Act as though all applicable terms and provisions of the Federal Trade Commission Act ( et seq.) were incorporated and made part of this section.15 U.S.C. 41

children.heading: Authority preserved
children.label: c Authority preserved
children.text: Nothing in this subtitle shall be construed to limit the authority of the Federal Trade Commission or the Food and Drug Administration under any other provision of law.
